task.name: validate-framework

metadata.description: Comprehensive validation of the entire COOKIE framework. Scans _cookie/ for structural integrity, reference consistency, configuration completeness, and manifest accuracy.

input.name: framework_root
input.description: Root directory of the COOKIE framework.

output.description: Comprehensive validation report with total checks, passed, warnings, and failed counts.

step.name: Initialize
step.description: Set up the validation run and establish framework paths.

actions.action: Record start timestamp
Initialize counters: total_checks = 0, passed = 0, warnings = 0, failed = 0
Initialize results array grouped by category

Establish framework paths: - framework_root = _cookie/ - config_dir = _cookie/_config/ - core_dir = _cookie/core/ - production_dir = _cookie/production/ - composition_dir = _cookie/composition/ - creative_dir = _cookie/creative/ - skills_dir = _cookie/skills/ - manifests_dir = _cookie/_config/ - commands_dir = .claude/commands/

step.name: Workflow Integrity
step.description: Scan all workflow.yaml files for unresolved variables and valid references.

actions.action: CHECK [WF-001]: No Unresolved {variables} in Workflows Discover all workflow.yaml files under _cookie/ recursively. For each workflow.yaml: - Scan all string values for patterns matching \{[a-zA-Z_]+\} - Exclude known runtime variables: {project-root}, {episode_id}, {episode_path}, {auto-detect}, {config_source} - Flag remaining unresolved variables as FAIL - If all variables resolve: PASS

CHECK [WF-002]: All File Paths in Workflows Reference Existing Files For each workflow.yaml: - Extract values that look like file paths (contain "/" and end in .xml, .md, .yaml, .csv, .json) - Resolve each path relative to project root (substitute known variables) - Exclude paths containing runtime variables like {episode_id} - If resolved path does not exist: FAIL - If exists: PASS

CHECK [WF-003]: All Agent References Match Agents in agents/ Directories Collect all agent identifiers referenced in workflow.yaml files. Scan _cookie/**/agents/ directories for agent definition files (.md). For each referenced agent: - If no matching agent definition file found: FAIL - If found: PASS

step.name: Slash Command Integrity
step.description: Check that all slash command files point to real files.

actions.action: CHECK [CMD-001]: All Slash Commands in .claude/commands/ Point to Real Files Scan all .claude/commands/**/*.md files. For each command file: - Read file content - Extract any file path references (paths to _cookie/ files, workflow files, etc.) - Verify each referenced file exists on the filesystem - If reference points to non-existent file: FAIL - If all references resolve: PASS

step.name: Config Inheritance
step.description: Verify config inheritance chain resolves correctly without cycles or missing parents.

actions.action: CHECK [CFG-001]: Config Inheritance Chain Resolves Correctly - Read _config/global.yaml as root config - Scan for module-level config files that extend or override global - Verify each "inherits" or "extends" reference resolves to an existing file - Check for circular inheritance (A extends B extends A) - If circular reference found: FAIL - If any "inherits" target is missing: FAIL - If chain resolves cleanly: PASS

step.name: Pricing Coverage
step.description: Verify pricing.yaml has entries for all tools used in workflows.

actions.action: CHECK [PRC-001]: pricing.yaml Has Entries for All Tools Used in Workflows - Read _config/pricing.yaml - Collect all tool identifiers from the pricing table - Scan all workflow.yaml files for tool references - For each tool referenced in workflows that is missing from pricing: FAIL - If all tools have pricing entries: PASS

step.name: Resolution Profiles
step.description: Verify resolution profiles are consistent with VEO model constraints.

actions.action: CHECK [RES-001]: Resolution Profiles Consistent with VEO Model Constraints - Read resolution-profiles.yaml - For each profile, verify VEO resolution is valid for the default model - VEO aspect ratios must be 16:9 or 9:16 - VEO durations must match model constraints (3.1: [4,6,8], 2.0: [5,6,7,8]) - If inconsistency found: WARN - If consistent: PASS

step.name: Help CSV Coverage
step.description: Verify help CSVs have entries for all slash commands.

actions.action: CHECK [HLP-001]: Help CSVs Have Entries for All Slash Commands - Collect all slash command names from .claude/commands/ (cookie-*.md files) - Read _config/cookie-help.csv - Read all module-help.csv files - For each slash command not found in any help CSV: WARN "Undocumented command" - For each help CSV entry that has no matching command file: WARN "Phantom help entry" - If all commands are documented: PASS

step.name: Manifest Integrity
step.description: Verify manifests are complete, accurate, and have the expected row counts.

actions.action: CHECK [MAN-001]: agent-manifest.csv Has 13 Rows - Read _cookie/_config/agent-manifest.csv - Count data rows (excluding header) - Expected: exactly 13 rows - If count != 13: FAIL "agent-manifest.csv has {count} rows, expected 13" - If count == 13: PASS - For each row, verify the referenced agent definition file exists - Check for duplicate agent_id values

CHECK [MAN-002]: task-manifest.csv Has 10 Rows - Read _cookie/_config/task-manifest.csv - Count data rows (excluding header) - Expected: exactly 10 rows - If count != 10: FAIL "task-manifest.csv has {count} rows, expected 10" - If count == 10: PASS - For each row, verify the referenced task file exists in _cookie/core/tasks/ - Check for duplicate task_id values

CHECK [MAN-003]: skill-manifest.csv Has 8 Rows - Read _cookie/_config/skill-manifest.csv - Count data rows (excluding header) - Expected: exactly 8 rows - If count != 8: FAIL "skill-manifest.csv has {count} rows, expected 8" - If count == 8: PASS - For each row, verify the referenced skill definition exists - Check for duplicate skill_id values

CHECK [MAN-004]: Manifests Are Accurate (no phantoms, no missing) - Compare agent-manifest.csv entries against actual agent files in _cookie/**/agents/ - Compare task-manifest.csv entries against actual task files in _cookie/core/tasks/ - Compare skill-manifest.csv entries against actual skill directories - For entries in manifests that don't match real files: FAIL "Phantom entry" - For real files not listed in manifests: FAIL "Missing from manifest" - If all match: PASS

step.name: Schema Validation
step.description: Validate JSON/YAML schemas and instances for structural correctness.

actions.action: CHECK [SCH-001]: character-schema.json Is Valid JSON Schema - Locate _cookie/skills/*/character-schema.json or _cookie/**/character-schema.json - Parse the file as JSON - Verify it contains required JSON Schema fields ($schema or type, properties) - Verify required character fields are defined (name, description, visual traits) - If file not found: WARN "character-schema.json not found" - If invalid JSON: FAIL "character-schema.json is not valid JSON" - If missing required schema fields: FAIL "character-schema.json is incomplete" - If valid: PASS

CHECK [SCH-002]: Existing identity.json Files Validate Against character-schema.json - Scan _cookie/**/characters/**/identity.json recursively - For each identity.json found: - Parse as JSON - Validate against character-schema.json (if SCH-001 passed) - Check all required fields are present and non-empty - If validation fails: FAIL "identity.json at {path} does not conform to character-schema.json: {details}" - If valid: PASS - If no identity.json files found: INFO "No character identity files found (not an error)"

CHECK [SCH-003]: SSD Template Is Valid YAML - Locate the SSD (Scene Specification Document) template file(s) - Parse as YAML - Verify required SSD structure: scenes array, each scene has id, description, duration - If file not found: WARN "SSD template not found" - If invalid YAML: FAIL "SSD template is not valid YAML" - If missing required structure: FAIL "SSD template is missing required fields" - If valid: PASS

CHECK [SCH-004]: Format-Presets Aspect Ratios Are Producible - Read format-presets.yaml - For each preset, extract the aspect_ratio value - Verify each aspect ratio is producible by the configured video generation tool (VEO) - Valid producible aspect ratios: 16:9, 9:16 (VEO constraints) - If a preset specifies an unsupported aspect ratio: WARN "Preset {name} has aspect ratio {ratio} which is not natively supported by VEO" - If all presets are producible: PASS

step.name: Path Resolution and Cross-Reference Integrity
step.description: Verify all ref: path patterns resolve and cross-references between agents, workflows, and manifests are consistent.

actions.action: CHECK [REF-001]: All ref: Path Patterns Resolve to Existing Files - Scan all YAML files under _cookie/ for values containing "ref:" patterns - For each ref: value, extract the referenced path - Resolve the path relative to the file's location and project root - Substitute known variables ({project-root}, {installed_path}, etc.) before checking - If resolved path does not exist on the filesystem: FAIL "Broken ref: {ref_value} in {file} does not resolve" - If all ref: paths resolve: PASS

CHECK [REF-002]: All {installed_path} Variables Resolve Correctly - For each workflow.yaml, extract the installed_path value - Substitute {project-root} with actual project root - Verify the resulting directory exists - Verify files referenced via {installed_path} (instructions, validation) exist within that directory - If directory or referenced files missing: FAIL "{installed_path} resolves to non-existent path" - If all resolve: PASS

CHECK [REF-003]: Cross-Reference Integrity -- Workflows to Manifests - Collect all workflow_id values from workflow.yaml files - Collect all agent values from workflow.yaml files - Verify every agent referenced in a workflow.yaml exists as an entry in agent-manifest.csv - Verify every workflow_id could be invoked by the agents listed in the manifests - If an agent is referenced in a workflow but missing from agent-manifest.csv: FAIL "Agent {agent} referenced in {workflow} but not in agent-manifest.csv" - If consistent: PASS

CHECK [REF-004]: Cross-Reference Integrity -- Agent Files to Manifests - Scan _cookie/**/agents/*.md for all agent definition files - For each agent file, extract the agent identifier - Verify a matching entry exists in agent-manifest.csv - Verify the manifest entry's file path points back to this agent file - If agent file exists but is not in manifest: FAIL "Agent file {path} has no manifest entry" - If manifest entry points to wrong file: FAIL "Manifest entry for {agent_id} points to {wrong_path}" - If all consistent: PASS

CHECK [REF-005]: Cross-Reference Integrity -- Skills to Manifests - For each required_skills entry in workflow.yaml files, resolve the path - Verify the skill file exists - Verify a corresponding entry exists in skill-manifest.csv - If skill referenced but not in manifest: WARN "Skill at {path} used in workflow but not in skill-manifest.csv" - If all consistent: PASS

step.name: Compile Report
step.description: Compile all results into the final validation report.

actions.action: Calculate: - overall_status: "PASS" if failed == 0, "FAIL" otherwise - Sort results by severity (errors first, then warnings) - Group results by category - Record end timestamp and compute duration_seconds
Ensure _cookie/validation/ directory exists
Write framework-validation-report.yaml

Generate auto-fix suggestions for common failures: - Missing manifest entry -> Suggest the CSV row to add (with all fields pre-filled from the discovered file) - Phantom manifest entry -> Suggest removing the row or creating the missing file - Missing help CSV entry -> Suggest the CSV row to add for the undocumented command - Broken file path reference -> Suggest the corrected path based on closest match found on filesystem - Unresolved variable -> Suggest adding the variable to the appropriate config file - Invalid identity.json -> List the specific fields that need correction - Missing SKILL.md -> Suggest creating the file with a template - Include auto-fix suggestions in the report under the "auto_fix" key per result entry - Mark each suggestion with confidence: "high" (safe to auto-apply), "medium" (review recommended), "low" (manual intervention needed)

error.action: HALT: "COOKIE framework directory not found at _cookie/. Cannot validate."
WARN: "Slash commands directory not found." Skip CMD checks.
WARN: "Configuration directory not found." Skip CFG and PRC checks.
FAIL the corresponding MAN check: "{manifest_file} not found."
FAIL the check for that file: "Failed to parse {file}: {error_details}". Continue with remaining checks.
WARN: "Cannot read {file}: permission denied." Continue with remaining checks.
